cornucopia_horn: The Cornucopia horn sounds! Tributes rush to the Cornucopia!
A loud horn blares, signaling the start of the games! Tributes sprint to the Cornucopia!
The Cornucopia horn echoes through the arena! Tributes dash towards it!
The sound of the Cornucopia horn fills the air! Tributes race towards it!
The Cornucopia horn blares, marking the beginning of the games! Tributes charge to the Cornucopia!
The Cornucopia horn sounds off! Tributes hurry to the Cornucopia!

{name} reaches the Cornucopia and secures a weapon!
{name} reaches the Cornucopia then runs away due to other tributes!
{name} reaches the Cornucopia and takes a moment to catch their breath!

{name1} and {name2} battle for control of the Cornucopia!

{name1} and {name2} fight fiercely over supplies at the Cornucopia!
{name1} and {name2} reach the Cornucopia and immediately start fighting for supplies!

{name1} and {name2} snatch supplies and scatter into the woods separately!
{name1} grabs supplies and flees, while {name2} does the same in another direction!

{name1} and {name2} reach the Cornucopia, grab what they can, and run in different directions!

{name} takes supplies and disappears into the forest!

{name} takes supplies and runs off into the woods!
{name} grabs supplies and runs into the forest!

{names} take supplies and head into the woods together!
{names} secure supplies and flee as a group!

attack_with_bleeding: {attacker} {verb} {defender} with {weapon} for {damage} damage, causing {bleeding_type} bleeding! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})
{attacker} {verb} {defender} with {weapon} for {damage} damage! The wound causes {bleeding_type} bleeding. {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})
{attacker}'s {weapon} inflicts {damage} damage on {defender} with a {verb}, causing {bleeding_type} bleeding! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})
attack_instant_kill: CRITICAL HIT! {attacker} {verb} {defender} with {weapon}, instantly killing them!
{attacker}'s {weapon} delivers a fatal blow to {defender} with a {verb}!
counterattack: {attacker} {verb} back at {defender} with {weapon} for {damage} damage! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})
{attacker} retaliates by {verb}ing {defender} with {weapon} for {damage} damage! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})
counterattack_with_bleeding: {attacker} {verb} back at {defender} with {weapon} for {damage} damage, causing {bleeding_type} bleeding! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})
{attacker} retaliates by {verb}ing {defender} with {weapon} for {damage} damage! The wound causes {bleeding_type} bleeding. {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})
{attacker}'s counterattack with {weapon} inflicts {damage} damage and {bleeding_type} bleeding on {defender}! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})
counterattack_instant_kill: CRITICAL COUNTERATTACK! {attacker} {verb} back at {defender} with {weapon}, instantly killing them!
{attacker}'s retaliatory {weapon} delivers a fatal blow to {defender} with a {verb}!
{attacker} retaliates with {weapon} for an INSTANT KILL on {defender}!
fight_no_death: {name1} and {name2} battle fiercely but neither falls.
survive_fight: {name1} and {name2} battled but neither was killed.
{name1} and {name2} clashed but both lived to fight another day.
betrayal_death: {victim} was stabbed in the back by {killer}!
betrayal_attempt: {traitor} tried to betray {victim}, but the fight ended without death.
{traitor} betrayed {victim}, but the attack didn't kill them.
lucky_escape: LUCKY ESCAPE! {defender} miraculously gets away from {attacker}!
{defender} has an incredible stroke of luck and escapes {attacker}!
By sheer luck, {defender} manages to slip away from {attacker}!
{defender} defies the odds and escapes from {attacker}!
A fortunate turn of events allows {defender} to escape {attacker}!
near_miss_bleeding: {attacker}'s {weapon} grazes {defender} with a {verb}, causing minor bleeding! {defender} health: {health}
{attacker} {verb}s at {defender} with {weapon} and barely hits, inflicting {damage} damage with minor bleeding! {defender} health: {health}
{attacker}'s near miss with {weapon} still causes a flesh wound on {defender}, leading to minor bleeding! {defender} health: {health}
already_has_weapon: {tribute} already has a {weapon} and leaves it.
{tribute} sees a {weapon} but already owns one.
{tribute} finds a {weapon} but doesn't need another one.
steal_weapon_fail: {thief} tries to steal {weapon} from {victim} but fails!
{thief} attempts to take {weapon} from {victim} but can't!
disarm_success: {attacker} disarms {defender}, forcing them to drop their {weapon}!
disarm_fail: {attacker} attempts to knock away {defender}'s weapon but can't!
{defender} holds onto their {weapon} tightly, resisting {attacker}'s disarm attempt!

{attacker} lands a head shot on {defender} with {weapon}, inflicting {damage} damage! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})

CRITICAL LEG STRIKE! {attacker}'s {weapon} shatters {defender}'s {limb} with a {verb}! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})

CRITICAL ARM STRIKE! {attacker}'s {weapon} shatters {defender}'s {limb} with a {verb}! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})

CRITICAL ARM STRIKE! {attacker}'s {weapon} shatters {defender}'s {limb} with a {verb}! {defender} (Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity})
head_shot_kill: HEAD SHOT KILL! {attacker} {verb}s {defender} in the head with {weapon}, instantly killing them!
CRITICAL HEAD SHOT! {attacker}'s {weapon} delivers a fatal blow to {defender}'s head with a {verb}!
FATAL HEAD INJURY! {attacker} lands a head shot on {defender} with {weapon}, killing them instantly!

form: {name1} and {name2} have decided to work together!
remain_allies: {name1} and {name2} remain allies and don't fight.
{name1} and {name2} stay loyal to their alliance.
dissolve: {name1} and {name2} decide to go their separate ways.

sponsor_gift: {name} gets a gift from their sponsors!
revive: The Gamemakers revive {name} due to sponsor intervention!
The Gamemakers bring {name} back to life!

attempt_success: {deceiver} successfully deceives {victim} with a convincing story!
no_attempt: {name} considers deceiving others but decides against it.
{name} thinks about manipulation but stays honest.

fatal_wound: {name} suffers a FATAL wound from {weapon}! They will bleed out within the day!
{name}'s wound from {weapon} is FATAL! Death from blood loss is imminent!
The {weapon} inflicts a FATAL wound on {name}! They won't survive the day!
severe_wound: {name} suffers a SEVERE wound from {weapon}! They need treatment or it could become fatal!
{name}'s {weapon} wound is SEVERE! Medical attention is urgently needed!
The {weapon} causes SEVERE bleeding in {name}! They require immediate help!
mild_wound: {name} suffers a MILD wound from {weapon}. They'll be fine with rest.
{name}'s {weapon} wound is MILD. It should heal naturally.
The {weapon} causes only MILD bleeding in {name}. No immediate concern.
infection: The wound becomes infected! {name} will suffer additional effects.
{name}'s wound develops an infection! This will complicate recovery.
Infection sets in {name}'s wound! Additional health and sanity loss expected.
fatal_bleeding: {name}'s fatal wound continues to bleed heavily! (-{damage} health)
{name} loses blood rapidly from their fatal wound! (-{damage} health)
The fatal bleeding drains {name}'s strength! (-{damage} health)
severe_bleeding: {name} continues to bleed from their severe wound! (-{damage} health)
Blood loss from {name}'s severe wound persists! (-{damage} health)
mild_bleeding: {name} experiences minor bleeding from their wound. (-{damage} health)
A small amount of blood loss from {name}'s mild wound. (-{damage} health)
severe_to_fatal: {name}'s severe bleeding has become FATAL! They need immediate treatment!
The severe bleeding in {name} becomes life-threatening!
self_treatment: {name} manages to treat their severe bleeding! The wound is now mild.
{name} successfully bandages their severe wound! Bleeding reduced to mild.
{name} applies pressure and treats their severe bleeding effectively.
ally_treatment: {name} receives help from {ally} to treat their severe bleeding!
{ally} assists {name} with their severe wound! Bleeding reduced.
{name} gets medical help from {ally} for their severe bleeding.
natural_healing: {name}'s wound heals on its own. Bleeding stopped.
The mild bleeding in {name} ceases naturally.
infection_effect: The infection in {name}'s wound causes additional problems! (-{damage} health, -{sanity} sanity)
{name}'s infected wound flares up! (-{damage} health, -{sanity} sanity)
infection_worsens: The infection worsens {name}'s bleeding to SEVERE!
{name}'s infection turns their mild bleeding severe!
Infection escalates {name}'s wound to severe bleeding!
bleeding_death: {name} dies from blood loss and infection!
{name} succumbs to combined blood loss and infection!
Fatal combination of bleeding and infection kills {name}!

tribute_status: District {district}: {name} - Health: {health}, Sanity: {sanity}, Speed: {speed}, Food: {food}, Water: {water}, Shelter: {shelter}, Allies: {allies}, Kills: {kills}
